vocab.meaning: ưu tiên tính năng hơn vẻ bề ngoài
vocab.example: Many office workers now prioritize functionality over aesthetics, choosing ergonomic sneakers instead of formal dress shoes.

vocab.meaning: có ý thức về thời trang, sành điệu
vocab.example: Fashion-conscious individuals are often willing to sacrifice comfort for the sake of making a bold statement.
Some people opt for towering high heels for a night out, even if it comes at the expense of their physical comfort.
In certain social circles, expensive but uncomfortable footwear serves as a status symbol rather than a practical necessity.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế tối ưu cho sự thoải mái và sức khỏe
vocab.example: There is a growing trend toward footwear with an ergonomic design to prevent long-term foot problems.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ phổ biến, thịnh hành
vocab.example: Chunky sneakers that offer both support and style are all the rage among the younger generation right now.
When buying shoes, I value versatility, looking for a pair that is both visually appealing and comfortable for walking.

vocab.meaning: gây ra vết phồng rộp (do đi giày chật/cứng)
vocab.example: I can't fathom why anyone would wear blister-inducing shoes just to look sophisticated for a few hours.

vocab.meaning: cân bằng giữa hai yếu tố
vocab.example: Ideally, high-end footwear brands should try to strike a balance between trendiness and wearable comfort.
The downside of wearing stylish but rigid boots is almost inevitably ending up with sore feet by the end of the day.
